prompt_template: Erstelle ein Produkt namens Eval Produkt {token} mit einem Preis ohne MwSt. von 1250 NOK. Führe nur die notwendigen Schritte aus. trace_token={token}
expected_behavior: The model should create one product with the requested name and price.
The model should not create unrelated customers or projects.
success_criteria: Product creation is visible in the tool trace.
The created product can be found by the unique name.
